data.body:
G4 container child-consistency audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 × THIS child 822a "Honest bidirectional round-trip probe; de-encode 'expected-bug' guards"), all 7 cross-child interaction modes checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/33d0/59ef/8937/fe57) under the high-confidence / benign-reading filter. VERDICT: clean pairing — no G4 cross-child finding; findings list EMPTY.

7-mode walk for this pairing:

- Implicit shared state — BENIGN. 822a file_impact = tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/jira_contract/test_roundtrip.py (new) + scripts/jira-pressure-test/e2e_field_validation_probe.sh (de-encode guards) + docs/jira-sync-setup.md (live-variant doc). DISJOINT from every sibling: 8937 (_snapshot_schema.py/test_snapshot_contract.py/fetcher.py), fe57 (_fakes.py/fixtures/capture script), 59ef (test_acliclient_contract.py/acli_graph.py), 33d0 (apply_outbound.py/batch_dispatch.py/applier.py), 2359 (batch_dispatch.py/applier.py/reconcile.py). No sibling touches the probe script or test_roundtrip.py. The fixtures/fake 822a consumes are PRODUCED by fe57 over the declared depends_on fe57 edge — clean producer/consumer split, no shared mutable co-edit.

- Conflicting assumptions — BENIGN. 822a AC1 round-trips comments, links, and parent — NOT labels — and asserts inbound↔outbound OUTCOMES, not the outbound labels_applied sub-op payload, so the labels representation matter localized to the 33d0↔2359 outbound-telemetry pairing is untouched by 822a. Its "production path" assumption is consistent with fe57 (unmassaged fixtures through fetch_snapshot), 8937 (snapshot-entry schema for comment/issuelinks/parent), and 33d0 (surviving production batch applier).

- Dependency gap — BENIGN. 822a's only input dependency — story A's fixtures/fake — is correctly declared via depends_on fe57. The producer↔consumer schema/contract (8937) is explicitly scoped OUT and is not required to stand up a behavioral round-trip. 822a binds to "the production path" abstractly: the inbound comment/issuelinks/parent reads and outbound batch comment/link/parent dispatch its round-trip exercises already exist in production (the epic closes a test/probe-coverage seam, not re-fixes the bugs), and after 33d0's collapse the survivor IS the production path by construction — so no hard 33d0-before-822a edge is required (same abstract-binding pattern ruled benign for keystone 8937). No unmet "fix-must-land-first" edge.

- Scope overlap — BENIGN (benign-reading filter). 8937 AC3 (assembled snapshot-entry key/shape CONTRACT — inbound differ READS comment/issuelinks/parent, test_snapshot_contract.py), 33d0 (OUTBOUND-only multi-sub-op consolidation correctness), and 822a AC1 (BIDIRECTIONAL inbound↔outbound comment/link/parent ROUND-TRIP / convergence, test_roundtrip.py) exercise the same production path from DISTINCT angles on DISTINCT files — complementary, not duplicative. 822a explicitly scopes the schema/contract OUT (→8937). (The existing-harness reconciliation against test_reconcile_roundtrip.py raised in PASS-1 G6 is an approach-soundness / coverage-demarcation concern about THIS child's own design — not a cross-child contradiction or sibling-breaking duplication — and does not meet the high-confidence G4 bar.)

- Ordering violation — BENIGN. 822a's edited files are disjoint from the 33d0↔2359 same-region outbound-applier sequencing cluster; the only hard ordering edge (fixtures before the consuming test) is captured by depends_on fe57.

- Consumer impact — BENIGN. 822a AC3 keeps the hermetic round-trip in CI (pytestmark = integration) and any live variant opt-in/scheduled/documented (docs/jira-sync-setup.md), consistent with the epic's "live e2e never flakes CI" posture and parent "lean suite / no net increase in brittle tests"; AC4 asserts round-trip OUTCOMES, not whole-blob equality, imposing no brittle expectation on consumers.

- Residual references — BENIGN. The Phase3.verify-inbound-comments-gap NOT-SYNCED guard 822a converts existed verbatim in the probe and is 822a's live audit target; no sibling deletes the probe scripts under scripts/jira-pressure-test. 33d0's deletion of the dead typed-leaf applier strands nothing 822a references — 822a drives the production batch path, not the typed leaf.

The roster-level parent anti-change-detector-guardrail criterion is a G3 coverage matter (and per the parent AC's verbatim "(owned by story B)" clause is owned by 8937) — not a G4 cross-child inconsistency, so not addressed here.

VERDICT for this pairing (parent × 822a): no G4 cross-child finding; all 7 interaction modes read benign under the high-confidence / benign-reading filter. Findings list EMPTY.
